basic_info.title: Final Fantasy XIII
basic_info.review: Final Fantasy XIII is a visually stunning RPG with innovative combat systems and memorable characters, though criticized for its linearity. The Xbox One X enhanced version offers the best experience with improved resolution and performance.

alternative_names: ファイナルファンタジーXIII (Final Fantasy Jūsan)

serie.serie_name: Fabula Nova Crystallis: Final Fantasy XIII

play_today.platform: Xbox One X / Xbox Series X|S (Backward Compatible)
play_today.details: The enhanced version with 4K resolution, improved cutscenes, and better performance. Considered the definitive version by Digital Foundry.
PC version enhanced with the community-made FF13Fix mod that uncaps framerate, fixes stuttering, and improves performance. Best for customization.

recommended_patches.name: FF13Fix Mod
recommended_patches.description: Performance and bug fixes mod that removes frame pacer, uncaps framerate (optional), enables triple buffering, and fixes various technical issues.

recommended_patches.name: Ultrawide Fix
recommended_patches.description: Removes pillarboxing on ultrawide monitors for 21:9 displays.

recommended_patches.name: Console Button Prompts
recommended_patches.description: Replaces PC keyboard prompts with console-style button icons for better visual clarity.

play_today.details: Original release with native resolution. Good version but inferior to Xbox One X enhanced in terms of visual quality and performance.

optimal_settings: Use Vulkan renderer for best compatibility

play_today.details: Original Xbox 360 release. Digital Foundry noted this version had inferior graphics compared to PS3, but the Xbox One X enhanced version fixes these issues.
Cloud streaming version released in Japan. Requires stable internet connection and offers the least control over performance settings.

description.synopsis: Lightning and her companions are thrust into a war between the sky city of Cocoon and the ground world of Pulse, fighting against fate and powerful creatures called fal'Cie.
key_features: Innovative Command Synergy Battle (CSB) combat system
Multiple endings based on player choices
description.long_description: Final Fantasy XIII, developed and published by Square Enix, represents a bold departure from traditional Final Fantasy formulas. Directed by Motomu Toriyama and featuring character designs by Yoshitaka Amano and Akira Toriyama, the game introduced the Command Synergy Battle system that combined traditional turn-based combat with real-time action elements. The Crystarium system allowed for deep character customization through a node-based progression tree. Despite criticism for its linearity compared to previous entries, the game was praised for its visual fidelity, emotional storytelling, and innovative mechanics. The Xbox One X enhanced version, released in 2018 as part of Microsoft's backward compatibility program, significantly improved upon the original by offering 4K resolution, better frame rates, and enhanced cutscene quality.
legacy_and_impact: Introduced the Command Synergy Battle system to Final Fantasy series
Pioneered the Crystarium character progression system
Part of the Fabula Nova Crystallis sub-series
Influenced subsequent Final Fantasy games with its combat mechanics
Xbox One X enhanced version set new standards for backward compatibility improvements
